memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: aster = 星形花，像星星一样绽放

asterisk + ed → 已标记星号的
asterisk + ing → 正在加星号
asterisk复数 → 多个星号

coreMeaning.en: at or toward the stern of a ship

coreMeaning.en: a small rocky body orbiting the sun; star-shaped

asteroid复数 → 小行星群
aster复数 → 紫菀花丛
a（无）+ sthenia（力）= 无力症

coreMeaning.cn: 虚弱的；无力的；瘦长体型的
coreMeaning.en: of or characterized by asthenia; weak

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: asthenia + ic → 虚弱的

coreMeaning.cn: 软流圈（地球上地幔中的软弱层）

coreMeaning.en: a respiratory condition causing difficulty breathing

asthmatic复数 → 哮喘患者们

coreMeaning.en: affected by astigmatism; a person with astigmatism

derivationChain: {'steps': [{'from': 'a- + stigma + -tic', 'to': 'astigmatic', 'rule': 'without a point → no focal point → astigmatism'}]}

coreMeaning.en: in motion; excited; out of bed

astonish + ed → 已被震惊的状态
astonish + es → 使…惊讶（他/她/它）
astonish + ing → 令人惊讶的

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: astonishing + ly → 惊人地
astonish + ment → 惊讶的状态

coreMeaning.en: to overwhelm with amazement; to shock

astound + ed → 被震惊的
astound + ing → 令人惊骇的
astound + s → 使…震惊（他/她/它）

coreMeaning.en: stars (Latin plural); used in proper names
